title: Refactor: Introduce dependency injection
original_text: Refactored to use dependency injection. Created DI container for managing dependencies. Injected dependencies through constructors. Implemented service locator pattern. This makes testing easier and reduces coupling. Added DI configuration file. Updated all classes to use DI. Added tests for DI setup. Result: 53 tests pass.
expected_body_lines: - Create DI container for managing dependencies
